description: Create a Server Rack diagram for 'Rack-B04 Elevation' in EdrawMax using a 42U Cabinet. The rack must include the following equipment arranged from bottom to top: an 'APC Smart-UPS 3000' (Units 1-4), three 2U servers labeled 'Web Server 1', 'Web Server 2', and 'DB Server', a 'Cisco Switch', and a 'Patch Panel' (positioned above the switch). Include the title 'Rack-B04 Elevation' at the top of the diagram. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/rack_elevation.eddx and export the final diagram to /home/ga/Documents/rack_elevation.png.
